title: Protect long-term healthspan
copy: Healthspan declines with age, which reduces physical function, resilience, and day-to-day capacity over time.
how_it_works: This graph shows that, at the same age, a more proactive approach helps preserve more healthspan for longer.

title: Preserve whole-body function
copy: The body’s main systems also decline with age, though not all at the same rate, which can gradually weaken overall function and resilience.
how_it_works: This graph shows how the body’s main systems all decline over the lifespan, which is why preserving function longer matters for healthier aging.

title: Protect long-term energy
copy: Available energy declines with age, making it harder to sustain the same level of daily activity, performance, and recovery over time.
how_it_works: This graph shows how energy gradually falls with age, which is why supporting it early is important for preserving day-to-day capacity.

title: Preserve long-term resilience
copy: Chronic inflammation and oxidative stress tend to build up over time, which can gradually reduce long-term health and life expectancy.
how_it_works: This graph shows how higher chronic inflammation and oxidative stress are associated with lower life expectancy, which is why reducing them early can support longevity.
